posts.text:
The head of the BBC, who’s resigning in disgrace, is admitting that his network is on a “knife edge.”

That's the same BBC that misled its audience by splicing together two snippets of President Trump's speech that were 50 MINUTES apart.

This is a crisis of its own making.

Video

Lots of coffee now takes ten or more words to order.

That’s cool. But Americans ought to know what the heck is in the cup of coffee they’re drinking.

Video

Here’s America’s game plan in Iran:

• Stop Iran’s work on a nuclear warhead.
• Destroy its missiles and drones.
• Cripple Iran’s ability to make more missiles and drones.
• Obliterate its navy and Revolutionary Guard infrastructure.

We’re making great progress.

Video

What does success look like in Iran?

It looks like leaving Iran’s government with four wheels down and its axle dragging.

Video

America tried to negotiate a peace deal with Iran.

Iran said no to everything except lunch.

The President didn’t have a choice.

Video

You would think the bigoted zealots running Iran would have learned a thing or two from their curb stomping in June.

But they didn’t.

They restarted their nuclear program and started stockpiling missiles. That’s not how you make peace with America.

Video

Khamenei is as dead as Jimmy Hoffa—and the Middle East is safer for it.

Video

The United Kingdom is trying to give away Diego Garcia, our important joint military base in the Indian Ocean—all because the U.N. called them a bunch of meanies.

And who are they giving it to?

Mauritius, a small island nation that’s buddies with the Chinese Communist Party.

Video

The Biden administration put our national security at risk by letting millions of illegal immigrants into our country unvetted.

But Democrats are prepared to just roll the dice and leave DHS shut down.

I’m not saying Republicans are perfect—but the other side is crazy.

Video

Iran is effectively run by Jack Nicholson in “The Shining.”

Their leaders are nuts. They want to kill people who don’t agree with them.

The President did the right thing.

Video

President Biden instructed AG Merrick Garland to prosecute a former President who was also his political opponent.

He kicked off all this lawfare that people like Susan Rice are calling for more of.

And, in the process, President Biden unleashed spirits he could not control.

Video

If there ever were a time to come together to fund DHS, it’s NOW.

But my Democratic colleagues aren’t being rational.

They’re scared to death of getting punished by the loon wing of their party, and they’re not budging.

Video

Obama-Biden advisor Susan Rice said that “it’s not going to end well” for businesses that “take a knee to Trump.”

Political payback like that happens in countries whose Powerball jackpot is 287 chickens and a goat.

It’s not supposed to happen in America.

Video

Several weeks ago, my Democratic colleagues signed off on DHS’s funding—until they un-signed off on it.

Now, they won’t agree to anything short of defunding ICE.

And that’s not going to happen.

Video

America is blessed with some of the world’s most talented athletes—including both of the star-spangled awesome teams who represented our country in Olympic hockey this year.

I'm proud of our U.S. women’s hockey team, and of our Canadian friends who played a great game, too.

53 House Democrats voted against declaring Iran the world’s largest state sponsor of terrorism.

Real strong drugs are the only possible explanation for this refusal to recognize reality.

Video

The Iranian regime is run by zealous religious nuts.

These people are 10 exits past normal.

Any fair-minded person has to conclude that if they got their hands on a nuclear warhead, they were going to use it.

Video

Sen. Markwayne Mullin is smart, tough as a pine knot, and a good manager.

He will do a great job as the new Secretary of DHS.

Video

I want to thank Secretary Noem for her good work in executing the President’s policy and securing the southern border.

Video

I couldn’t be prouder of the boys on the U.S. Hockey team for their hard-fought Olympic victory.

And I have to give credit where credit’s due: Well-played, Team Canada.

Video
